subject: English
title: Weathering the Storm in Ersama – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The story is written by Harsh Mander
A super cyclone struck Orissa in 1999
Prashant is the main character who helps villagers
Villagers took shelter in a Red Cross shelter
Community cooperation helped people survive the disaster
characters: Prashant – A brave nineteen-year-old boy who helps his village during the disaster
Villagers – Survivors of the cyclone who cooperate to rebuild their lives
Orphaned Children – Victims of the cyclone who receive care from the community
themes: Helping others in times of crisis
literary_devices: Imagery – The author vividly describes destruction caused by the cyclone
Symbolism – The cyclone represents the destructive power of nature
exam_tips: Remember that Prashant is nineteen years old
Focus on Prashant’s leadership and courage
Mention community cooperation as the main theme
Refer to the cyclone as the major event of the story
